chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – Satisfaction with the Judgement (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/ 8)
text: أَحَقُّ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ أَنْ يُسَلِّمَ لِمَا قَضَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَنْ عَرَفَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِالْقَضَاءِ أَتَى عَلَيْهِ الْقَضَاءُ وَ عَظَّمَ اللَّهُ أَجْرَهُ وَ مَنْ سَخِطَ الْقَضَاءَ مَضَى عَلَيْهِ الْقَضَاءُ وَ أَحْبَطَ اللَّهُ أَجْرَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Sinan, from Salih Bin Uqba, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Ju’fy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said ‘The most rightful of the creatures of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is (one who) submits to whatever Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic has Judged. The one who recognises Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, and the one who is satisfied with the Judgement, the Judgement would come upon him anyway, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Magnify his Recompense; and the one who is angry with the Judgement, the Judgement would come upon him anyway, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Drop his Recompense’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Sinan from Salih ibn ‘Aqaba from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Ja’fi from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘The most proper people to agree with the decisions of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, are those who have recognized Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy. Whoever agrees with the decision of Allah that is to take place anyway, Allah increases his reward. Whoever disagrees with the decision of Allah, the decision is, inevitably, applied to him but his reward becomes void.”’
